# Test: Property with validation to ensure age stays within valid range
class Person:
    _age: int
    
    def __init__(self, age: int):
        self._age = age
    
    property get age(self) -> int:
        return self._age
    
    property set age(self, value: int):
        if value < 0:
            self._age = 0
        elif value > 150:
            self._age = 150
        else:
            self._age = value

def main():
    p = Person(25)
    print(p.age)
    p.age = -5
    print(p.age)
    p.age = 200
    print(p.age)
    p.age = 50
    print(p.age)
    # EXPECTED OUTPUT:
    # 25
    # 0
    # 150
    # 50
